---
title: Getting Started
description: Repository orientation, local tooling, and contribution notes for people working on the site.
---

Start here when you are trying to understand how the site is organized or how to
make a safe contribution.

## Pages

- [Site Architecture](architecture.html): how docs, challenge pages, Data Hub pages, metadata, and future surfaces fit together.
- [Software Stack](software-stack.html): containers, streamers, notebooks, validators, and model repositories.
- [Contributing](contributing.html): how to add or update documentation and metadata.
